assertions.title: Default tokenlist loads on first visit

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ in fresh browser
steps.expected: App loads with default tokenlist available

steps.action: Open Settings modal via gear icon
steps.expected: Default tokenlist appears as a source in settings
steps.observed: Settings shows 'Uniswap Labs Default' with 87 tokens, toggle enabled

steps.action: Close settings, type 'USD' in From Token field
steps.expected: Autocomplete dropdown shows tokens from default list
steps.observed: Autocomplete shows USDbC (0xd9aAEc86B65D86f6A7B5B1b0c42FFA531710b6CA) and USDC (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913) on Base chain

steps.action: Check file is tracked in git
steps.expected: git ls-files returns the file path
steps.observed: git ls-files static/tokenlist.json returns 'static/tokenlist.json' (committed, not gitignored)
HTTP 200, response body starts with {"name":"Uniswap Labs Default","tokenlists":[{"name":"Uniswap Labs Default","tokens":[...]}

evidence.network: GET /tokenlist -> 200, response contains valid tokenlist JSON with 'Uniswap Labs Default' name

steps.observed: grep returns 0 matches in .env; env.example has it commented out: # DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS=static/tokenlist.json,static/another-list.json

steps.expected: Code falls back to static/tokenlist.json when DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS is unset
steps.observed: getDefaultTokenlistPaths() checks process.env.DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS; when not set, returns [resolve(cwd, 'static', 'tokenlist.json')]

steps.action: Verify app works with fallback (settings shows single default list)
steps.expected: Single default tokenlist loads and functions correctly
steps.observed: Settings shows exactly one default source: 'Uniswap Labs Default' with 87 tokens. GET /tokenlist -> 200.

steps.action: Load app and inspect header layout
steps.expected: Gear icon is in page header row alongside h1 title, not in form row with chain selector
steps.observed: Gear button (aria-label='Open settings') and h1 'Compare DEX Routers' are both children of div.page-header (sameParent: true)

steps.action: Verify chain selector is NOT in same container as gear
steps.expected: Chain selector is in a separate form row
steps.observed: Chain selector combobox is in a separate generic container below the page-header div. Visual screenshot confirms gear is top-right next to title, chain is below in form area.

steps.expected: Visual evidence of gear in header
steps.observed: Screenshot val-qf-g1-main-view.png shows gear icon in top-right of header next to 'Compare DEX Routers' title

steps.action: Grep AGENTS.md for commit-push-pr and feature branch convention
steps.expected: AGENTS.md contains guidance about feature branches and /commit-push-pr
steps.observed: Line 68: '**All work must be done on feature branches.** Use the `/commit-push-pr` command to create commits and PRs. **Never commit directly to main.** This ensures all changes are reviewed before merging.'

steps.expected: Convention is in a named section (e.g., Git Workflow)
steps.observed: Located under '### Git Workflow' section within '## Conventions'

evidence.terminalOutput: grep match at AGENTS.md line 68: '**All work must be done on feature branches.** Use the `/commit-push-pr` command to create commits and PRs. **Never commit directly to main.**'

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-TL-001 confirmed default tokenlist loads and autocomplete works. VAL-TL-002 confirmed static/tokenlist.json is committed and GET /tokenlist returns 200. VAL-TL-004 confirmed DEFAULT_TOKENLISTS unset falls back to static/tokenlist.json. VAL-HDR-001 confirmed gear icon is in .page-header alongside h1, not in form row. VAL-CONV-001 confirmed AGENTS.md contains feature-branch and /commit-push-pr convention at line 68.
